zh.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.Llanymynech, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾利安米內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd於1224年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan38歲，母親Gwenllian verch Hywel19歲。她和Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri至少有6個女兒。她去世於1261年在英國威爾斯享年37歲。

zh-hans.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh-hans.Llanymynech, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾利安米內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd于1224年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，她的父亲Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan38岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Hywel19岁。她和Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri至少有6个女儿。她去世于1261年在英国威尔斯享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

en.lifeSummary: When Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd was born in 1224, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, was 38 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Hywel, was 19. She had at least 6 daughters with Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri. She died in 1261, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd est née en 1224, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Hywel, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 filles avec Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri. Elle est décédée en 1261, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd 1224 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan 38 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Hywel 19. Sie hatte mit Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri mindestens 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1261 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd è nata il nel 1224 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian verch Hywel, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figlie con Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri. Morì nel 1261, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Tangwystl ferch Gruffyddが1224年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychanは38歳，母Gwenllian verch Hywelは19歳であった。彼女はIorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffriとの間に少なくとも6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1261年にイギリスウェールズで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd(이)가 1224년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Hywel(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1261년 영국 웨일스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Powys,Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd nasceu em 1224, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Hywel, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhas com Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri. Ela faleceu em 1261, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd родилась в 1224 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Hywel, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 6 дочерей от Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri. Она умерла в 1261 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tangwystl ferch Gruffydd nació en 1224, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Hywel, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijas con Iorwerth "Foelddu" ap Griffri. Murió en 1261, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
